1.description: E[S|U] for differentσB's. The parameters used areω0=0.7,σA=1,σF=1/2,σb=1/5, andμB=2. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

2.description: E[S|U] for differentμB's. The parameters used areω0=0.7,σA=1,σF=1/2,σb=1/5, andσB=2. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

3.description: The distribution ofFOMover the full sample. In this figure, we plot the distribution of FOM across the full sample.FOMis given asKN−MN, whereK(M)is the number of forecasts strictly lower (higher) than actual earnings, andNis the total number of analyst forecasts. On thex-axis are bins for various values ofFOM. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

4.description: The distribution ofFOMover the full sample and conditional on different numbers of analyst forecastsN. In this figure, we plot the distribution of FOM over the full sample and conditional on different number of analyst forecastsN.FOMis given asKN−MN, whereK(M)is the number of forecasts strictly lower (higher) than actual earnings, andNis the total number of analyst forecasts. On thex-axis are bins for various values ofFOM. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

5.description: The Time series of the misses from the same side. In this figure, we plot the time series of the misses from the same side (in the percentage points) over the sample period from 1983 to 2015. The dotted line plots the time series for the proportion of stocks to have all analyst forecasts being above actual earnings. The dashed line plots the time series for the proportion of stocks to have all analyst forecasts being below actual earnings. The solid line plots the time series for the proportion of stocks to have all analyst forecasts being above actual earnings or being below actual earnings. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
